name: @umbraculum/navigation
description: Cross-platform routing-policy framework: route ID system, RouteRef type, web/native target mappers. Framework-agnostic by design (does not import React Navigation or Next.js types). Current route IDs include brewery routes; content split deferred per sub-plan #9 §1.4. Renamed from @brewery/navigation as sub-plan #9 slot 3 (2026-05-19).

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts src/native.ts --format esm,cjs --dts --out-dir dist --clean --tsconfig tsconfig.build.json
